name: ai-release-guardian
description: Codex-ready release artifact guard for AI context files, source maps, prompts, MCP configs, and secrets.

interface.shortDescription: Stop shipping AI context, source maps, prompts, MCP keys, and secrets.
interface.longDescription: Artifact-level release security workflow for the post-CLAUDE.md and post-Claude-Code-source-map era. Use it before publishing apps, npm packages, CLIs, archives, or open-source repos.
defaultPrompt: Scan this release artifact before I publish it.
Review this repo for AI context and prompt leaks.
Create a release gate for npm or app artifacts.
